data.title: Plug and Play partners with Ricoh to innovate digital workplace solutions, leading innovation platform.
data.description: In a recent update on September 12, 2025, from Sunnyvale, California, it was disclosed that Plug and Play, a renowned innovation platform, has formed a significant partnership with Ricoh Company, Ltd., a worldwide supplier of digital services and workplace solutions. This collaboration will witness Ricoh becoming a part of Plug and Play's network, aiming to enhance innovation and technological advancements.

data.title: ImageTrend achieves NEMSIS 3.5.1 compliance for its ePCR platform, Elite, among first nationwide.
data.description: EAGAN, Minnesota - On September 12, 2025, ImageTrend, LLC revealed that its ePCR platform, ImageTrend Elite, has reached NEMSIS v3.5.1 compliance for both Collect Data and Receive & Process functions. This makes ImageTrend one of the pioneering vendors nationwide to attain compliance for Receive & Process.
Gemini Resumes Trading After Halt Due to Market Volatility

data.title: Military Influencer Conference 2025 to be sponsored by USAA, reaffirming support for service members. Event scheduled for Sept. 21-24 in Atlanta.
data.description: In Atlanta, the Military Influencer Conference (MIC) announced its presenting and major sponsors for MIC 2025, happening on Sept. 21–24 at Signia by Hilton Atlanta Georgia World Congress Center. USAA will be the presenting sponsor, showcasing dedication to service members, veterans, and families. Another key sponsor is CareSource Military & Veterans, a health management firm catering to TRICARE. This premier event for military-connected individuals, entrepreneurs, and advocates will bring together leaders and professionals in the field. Don't miss this opportunity to join the discussion and network with key players in the military community.

data.title: DeFi whale hit with $40M loss, Kinto folding and SwissBorg hacked. MYX token surges by 1,100%, Worldcoin by 90%.
data.description: The native token of MYX Finance saw the biggest increase of the week, jumping by more than 1,100%. Following closely behind was Worldcoin, which experienced a gain of over 90%.

data.title: Latino Community Foundation doubles 2025 grantmaking, gives $2.9M in Q3 to 52 orgs, focusing on voter engagement and immigrant rights.
data.description: In San Francisco, the Latino Community Foundation disclosed that they distributed $2.95 million to 52 different organizations in the third quarter of 2025. This round of funding also marks the first time grant investments were made in Texas and New Mexico. Almost half of the funds were allocated towards enhancing civic power and facilitating community-based voter engagement efforts. These initiatives aim to equip Latino communities for the upcoming 2026 midterm elections, as well as reinforce protection and advocacy for immigrant rights. Notably, the Foundation's Board approved a substantial 91% increase in grantmaking activities.

data.title: Class-action lawsuit filed against Sable Offshore (SOC) for misleading investors on oil production. Investors urged to contact Hagens Berman.
data.description: Investors who have suffered losses are urged to reach out to Hagens Berman as a recent class-action lawsuit has been brought against Sable Offshore Corp. (NYSE: SOC) and its executives. The lawsuit alleges that the company provided false information about its oil production to investors. The case was filed on September 12, 2025, in San Francisco, and targets SOC and its management team. If you are an investor affected by this and have incurred losses, it is recommended that you contact Hagens Berman for assistance with this matter.

data.title: Private 5G market report 2025-2030 from SNS Telecom & IT added to ResearchAndMarkets.com offering, assessing value chain, market drivers and trends.
data.description: A new report titled "Private 5G Market 2025-2030: Opportunities, Challenges, Strategies & Forecasts" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report, from SNS Telecom & IT, provides a comprehensive analysis of the private 5G network market. It covers aspects such as the market value chain, drivers influencing market growth, obstacles to adoption, technologies driving advancement, operational and business strategies, industry sectors, application possibilities, prevalent trends, future projections, standardization efforts, and spectrum availability. This report aims to offer insights into the private 5G landscape, catering to the period between 2025-2030.

data.title: 3,200 St. Louis Boeing workers reject contract, extending strike at military aircraft plants.
data.description: A strike lasting five weeks at facilities producing military aircraft and equipment will persist as 3,200 union members rejected the proposed agreement.

data.title: Institutional accumulation and staking boost Ethereum as it hits record $4,600 in September, says CryptoQuant.
data.description: Institutional accumulation and the increase in staking interest are being attributed by CryptoQuant as factors behind Ethereum's milestone of surpassing $4,600 for the first time this September.

data.title: Resbiotic® raises $14.5M for gut health platform growth. $8M from Series A round. Founded in Birmingham, Boston, and Dallas.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, Boston, and Dallas, on September 12, 2025, Resbiotic Nutrition, Inc., a health and wellness company founded by a physician-scientist, disclosed that it has secured $14.5 million in funding. This sum encompasses a recently finalized $8 million Series A round which received backing from major stakeholders.

data.title: New social audio app Gistvox launched: users share stories in 2 mins to global audience. BOYCE, Va., Sept. 12, 2025.
data.description: In an announcement made today in Boyce, Virginia, on September 12, 2025, Gistvox was introduced to the public. It is a unique social audio platform that aims to revive the essence of human connection in digital storytelling by providing a platform for individuals to share their narratives in two minutes or less.

data.title: Ashley Graham partners with Breescape to promote cooling sleep products for hot sleepers. (Characters: 90)
data.description: A renowned supermodel and advocate for body positivity has teamed up with a leading sleep brand focused on cooling technology to promote all-night comfort tailored for various body types and sleep patterns. The collaboration was announced in New York on September 12, 2025. Breescape™, the bedding company known for its commitment to offering uninterrupted cooling relief for individuals experiencing hot flashes and sleep disturbances, is at the forefront of this venture.

data.title: BananaImg AI launches innovative platform merging Google's Nano Banana AI and Veo 3, providing advanced image and video capabilities.
data.description: BananaImg AI has introduced the pioneering creative platform, consolidating the most advanced image and video generation technologies worldwide. This platform marks a significant milestone in the industry, integrating a variety of innovative capabilities within a unified suite. The announcement was made in Sheridan, Wyoming, on September 12, 2025. BananaImg AI's platform stands out as the initial service to combine these cutting-edge features into a single comprehensive offering.

data.title: APT212 joins forces with Compass, enhancing its boutique focus with the #1 U.S. brokerage, offering top tools and nationwide reach.
data.description: In New York on September 12, 2025, APT212, a boutique real estate brokerage located in SoHo and known for luxury condo sales and investment properties, has announced a partnership with Compass. This collaboration will merge APT212's specialized boutique approach with Compass's platform, enhancing their services. The partnership aims to leverage APT212's expertise in luxury real estate with Compass's broader reach, benefiting both firms.

data.title: WMCHealth Network appoints Dr. Peter G. Paige as Chief Clinical Officer to enhance patient care across 9 hospitals.
data.description: A prominent medical leader has been chosen to oversee clinical excellence, quality, and patient safety throughout the nine-hospital network of WMCHealth. The newly established Chief Clinical Officer position aims to establish WMCHealth as a benchmark for contemporary academic healthcare. The appointment was made in Valhalla, New York on September 12, 2025.
